zh.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Richardson I於1503年出生在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Richardson23歲，母親Katherine Duxford28歲。他於1523年5月14日與Lady Mary Margaret Beeston在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1563年9月3日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾維斯特米爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的 笛卡爾 菲什 史崔特 煙雨 聖 格雷戈里 白 聖 保羅。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Richardson I was born in 1503, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Richardson, was 23 and his mother, Katherine Duxford, was 28. He married Lady Mary Margaret Beeston on 14 May 1523, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 September 1563, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in London St Mary Magdalene Old Fish Street with St Gregory by St Paul, Middlesex, England.

Il a épousé Lady Mary Margaret Beeston le 14 mai 1523, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1563, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à London St Mary Magdalene Old Fish Street with St Gregory by St Paul, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ko.London St Mary Magdalene Old Fish Street: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 막달레나 드 피시 스트릿 위스 스트 그레고리 비 스트 폴
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Richardson I(이)가 1503년 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Richardson(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Duxford(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1523년 5월 14일 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 Lady Mary Margaret Beeston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1563년 9월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 막달레나 드 피시 스트릿 위스 스트 그레고리 비 스트 폴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Margaret Beeston em 14 de maio de 1523, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Richardson I родился в 1503 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Richardson было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Duxford, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Margaret Beeston 14 мая 1523 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 сентября 1563 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности лондон ст мэри магдеилин олд фиш стрит вит ст грегори би ст поул, миддлесекс, Англия.
